title: FinnGen Endpoint Browser
description: Search and explore the complete catalog of FinnGen disease endpoints. Each endpoint represents a phenotype derived from Finnish hospital discharge records, cause-of-death data, and primary care registers.
tips: Search endpoints by ICD-10 code, FinnGen endpoint ID (e.g., I9_CHD), or free-text phenotype description.
Endpoints tagged with broad definitions (FINNGEN_GWAS_*) include all ICD codes under a chapter — narrow endpoints are more specific.
Case and control counts are from FinnGen R10 (approximately 500,000 participants).
Click GWAS Results to view the full association summary for an endpoint including top variants and Manhattan plot.
FinnGen endpoints follow the OHDSI cohort definition paradigm — you can map them to Parthenon cohort definitions for cross-study comparison.
